what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel attachment record that associates the attachment identifier att-f5e96625 with a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists solely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares an id of att-f5e96625.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-c1a03977.
It records an added timestamp of 2026-06-24T15:14:05.060730+00:00.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme to identify a board item.
The attachment_type is board_items, indicating a link to a board entity rather than a message or file.
The record is purely referential with no payload beyond metadata.
notes: A minimal metadata stub that records which board item an attachment belongs to in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does att-f5e96625 actually represent?
What is the semantic meaning of the board item item-c1a03977?
What operations are expected for an attachment of type board_items?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to attach a record to a board item, and the file does exactly that through its target field.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to maintain a durable, queryable association between an attachment and a specific board item so that attachments can be retrieved in the context of board entities.
contribution: It contributes a persistent, timestamped association between an attachment identifier and a board item target within a channel, supporting lookup and provenance without embedding payload data.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking attachment att-f5e96625 to board item item-c1a03977 in the dragnet-development channel with a recorded creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record that attachment att-f5e96625 is associated with board item item-c1a03977 in the dragnet-development channel.
